case_title: BALWANT D. THAKOR VS. FELIX KHIM ROCHA

docket_entries.description: EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ROCHA, FELIX KHIM
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $25 FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ROCHA, FELIX KHIM THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: ** DEFENDANT VACATED ON 10/21/09, $3,410.00 RENT, $405.00 COSTS, $175.00 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,990.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D. AS TO DEFENDANT ROCHA, FELIX KHIM SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
